project: LinkedIn Ad Library → Ops Tables → Ads Manager Pipeline
description: Connect Ad Library (intelligence), Ops Tables (creative workspace), and LinkedIn Ads Manager (campaign execution) — multi-select ads, import to ops table, remix with AI, push to campaigns, capture analytics back.

extractedRequirements: Multi-select ads in Ad Library + batch import to ops table
3-step import wizard with Creative Testing Template preset
from_ad_library edge function handler with media archival
Auto-detect source image columns in AI wizards
Remix All bulk action across selected rows
Ops table ↔ LinkedIn campaign binding UI
Budget column mapping with spend approval gate
Analytics sorting, conditional formatting, comparison view
extractedConstraints: No import-router exists — create standalone edge function following import-from-hubspot pattern
No linkedin-campaign-manager exists — create new following instantly-admin pattern
CrossOpImportWizard exists at src/components/ops/CrossOpImportWizard.tsx — blueprint for import wizard
BulkActionsBar exists with callback pattern — add onRemixAll
AddColumnModal has 21 types — need to add linkedin_analytics
OpsTableCell has 21 cases — need to add linkedin_analytics dispatch
Column CHECK constraint needs linkedin_analytics added via migration
LinkedIn API: max 10 creatives per request, 100 calls/day/member

team.tierReason: 14 stories, 1 schema migration, LinkedIn API (Creatives+Images+Analytics), cross-feature deps (Ad Library+Ops+Campaign Manager), security surface (real ad spend), existing patterns

stories.title: Schema migration: add linkedin_analytics column type
acceptance: Migration adds 'linkedin_analytics' to dynamic_table_columns.column_type CHECK constraint
DROP CONSTRAINT IF EXISTS + CREATE (idempotent)
Also adds 'ai_image', 'fal_video', 'svg_animation' if not already present
Migration is re-runnable

stories.title: Multi-select UI in Ad Library
acceptance: Checkbox overlay on each ad card in Ad Library grid/list view
selectedAdIds: Set<string> state tracks selections across pagination
Select All checkbox in toolbar selects all visible ads
Floating bulk actions bar when >= 1 ad selected with count
Add to Ops Table button opens AdLibraryImportWizard (LAP-004)
Typecheck passes

stories.title: from_ad_library import edge function
acceptance: New edge function import-from-ad-library (follow import-from-hubspot pattern)
Accepts: org_id, user_id, ad_ids, table_id?, table_name?, column_mapping, template?
Creates dynamic_tables row with source_type: 'ad_library' when table_id is null
Creates columns, rows, cells in batch (chunks of 50)
Archives media URLs to Supabase Storage (linkedin-ad-assets/{org_id}/{ad_id}/)
Stores ad_library_ad_id in cell metadata
Auth: JWT + org membership, getCorsHeaders(req), pins @supabase/supabase-js@2.43.4

stories.title: Ad Library Import Wizard
acceptance: 3-step wizard following CrossOpImportWizard pattern
Step 1: Select existing ops table OR create new + Creative Testing Template preset
Step 2: Column mapping with auto-map matching fields
Step 3: Review summary + Import button triggering edge function
Loading state, success toast with navigate link
Typecheck passes

stories.title: Source image auto-detection in AI wizards
acceptance: AI Image wizard detects url columns with image URLs → 'Remix from: [column]' option
Fal Video wizard detects image columns → 'Image-to-Video from: [column]' option
SVG Animation wizard detects text/image columns → 'Animate from: [column]' option
Source column auto-populates prompt template with {{column_key}}
Manual config still available (not forced)
Typecheck passes

stories.title: Ops table to LinkedIn campaign binding UI
acceptance: LinkedIn Campaign section in OpsDetailPage settings panel
Dropdowns for campaign group + campaign (existing or new)
Structure choice: single_campaign (A/B) or per_row_campaign
Binding stored in dynamic_tables.integration_config JSONB
Connection status indicator, requires LinkedIn integration connected
Typecheck passes

stories.title: Column-to-creative mapping wizard
acceptance: 3-step wizard: Map columns → Preview creatives → Budget config
Maps ops columns to LinkedIn fields (headline, body, CTA, URL, media)
Preview shows mock creative cards from actual row data
Budget: manual entry OR map from number column + optional weight column
Mapping stored in integration_config.linkedin.column_mapping
Validates headline + body minimum
Typecheck passes

stories.title: Remix All bulk action
acceptance: Remix All button in BulkActionsBar when rows selected + AI columns exist
Confirmation dialog with row count, column count, estimated credit cost
Triggers existing onGenerate handlers per cell type
Progress: Generating X of Y in bulk actions bar
Individual cells show own pending/processing/completed states
Toast on complete/fail
Typecheck passes

stories.title: LinkedIn Analytics column type + wizard
acceptance: linkedin_analytics column type registered in AddColumnModal
Wizard: metric selector, date range selector, refresh schedule selector
Cell renders formatted numeric value (%, $, integer as appropriate)
Column header shows metric name + date range
Registered in OpsTableCell dispatch
Typecheck passes

stories.title: create_creatives_from_ops edge function
acceptance: New action in linkedin-campaign-manager edge function
Reads mapped cell values from dynamic_table_cells per row
Uploads images via LinkedIn Images API (initializeUpload)
Creates creatives via LinkedIn Creatives API
Stores linkedin_creative_urn in cell metadata
Batches: max 10 per request, handles partial failures per-row
Auth: JWT + org membership + LinkedIn token from linkedin_org_integrations
Token refresh on 401
Typecheck passes

stories.title: Budget column mapping + validation
acceptance: Number column designatable as Budget via wizard (LAP-007 step 3)
Single campaign: total budget = sum of row values or manual override
Per-row campaign: each row's value = that campaign's daily budget
Optional Weight column for proportional distribution
Validation: min $10/day, no negatives
Budget changes trigger campaign update via update_campaign action
One-directional: ops table → LinkedIn only
Typecheck passes

stories.title: Analytics-to-ops sync edge function
acceptance: New edge function linkedin-analytics-to-ops
Accepts: table_id, column_id, metric, date_range, row_ids?
Resolves row → creative via cell metadata linkedin_creative_urn
Reads from linkedin_campaign_metrics (already populated)
Aggregates metrics per creative over date range
Writes to dynamic_table_cells.value, handles unmapped rows
Stores sync metadata in cell metadata
Auth: JWT + org membership
Typecheck passes

stories.title: Campaign launch with spend approval gate
acceptance: Launch Campaign button in ops table toolbar (visible when campaign bound)
Disabled until creatives created + budget set
Spend confirmation modal: name, variations, daily/lifetime/monthly budget
Requires typing LAUNCH to confirm
Calls update_status with ACTIVE for each campaign
Creates linkedin_campaign_approvals record
Campaign Live status badge, error handling
Typecheck passes

stories.title: Auto-sync cron + manual refresh controls
acceptance: Refresh Analytics button in ops table toolbar (when linkedin_analytics columns exist)
Triggers immediate sync for all analytics columns
Loading spinner, disabled during sync, Last synced timestamp
Daily auto-sync cron edge function at 6:00 AM UTC
Both manual + auto call same sync handler (LAP-012)
Toast on completion
Typecheck passes

stories.title: Analytics controls + comparison view
acceptance: Analytics columns support sorting (asc/desc by metric value)
Conditional formatting: green top 25%, red bottom 25%
Column footer: total (Impressions/Clicks/Spend) or average (CTR/CPA/CPL)
Date range picker in column header menu
Compare toggle highlights best/worst per metric
Typecheck passes
